name: Warp
tagline: Teleport yourself and others across space.

baseAbility.name: Teleport / Bend Space
baseAbility.description: Standard action, 0 SP. Teleport: instantly move yourself or a touched willing creature (plus carried gear) up to a short distance that grows with caster level; requires line of sight to the destination. Bend Space: create a bounded area that resists creatures leaving it (Will save to exit) for as long as you concentrate, or 1 SP for 1 round/CL.

talents.name: Distant Teleport
talents.description: Greatly increase the distance you can teleport with a single casting.

talents.name: Quick Teleport
talents.description: Reduce the action needed to teleport, eventually down to a swift or move action.

talents.name: Unwilling Teleport
talents.description: Teleport an unwilling creature within range instead of only willing touched targets (Will save negates).

talents.name: Teleport Object
talents.description: Teleport an unattended object instead of only creatures.

talents.name: Unseeing Teleport
talents.description: Teleport to a location you're familiar with even without direct line of sight to it.

talents.name: Dimensional Lock
talents.description: Ward an area so that all extradimensional travel (including other casters' Warp effects) automatically fails within it.

talents.name: Plane Manipulator (space)
talents.description: New bend space option: create a small extradimensional pocket space you can access and use for storage or refuge.

talents.name: Pouncing Teleport
talents.description: Make a melee attack immediately after teleporting adjacent to a foe.

talents.name: True Teleport (advanced)
talents.description: Advanced teleport: cross vast distances reliably, functioning much like the teleport spell.

talents.name: Splinter
talents.description: Teleporting a target this way also deals direct damage that bypasses hardness, DR, and energy resistance.
